examples: They say they are caught in the crossfire between the education establishment and the government.
Dozens of innocent civilians will be killed in the crossfire.
The child was standing in the middle of the crossfire, defenselessly.
With all the changes going on, it is easy to get caught in the crossfire.
Appearing on CNN's Crossfire on April 15, 1987, Buchanan defended his support for Linnas.
